goal: Implement a simple_moving_average function in sma.py and a comprehensive pytest suite in test_sma.py covering normal and edge cases.
scope: Create sma.py with simple_moving_average(prices, window) function that returns a list where result[i] is the average of the window prices ending at index i, with the first window-1 entries as None
Create test_sma.py with pytest test cases covering: normal case, window=1, window equal to len(prices), window larger than prices, empty prices (ValueError), and window=0 (ValueError)
out_of_scope: Exponential moving average or other moving average variants
CLI interface or script entry point
Type annotations or data validation beyond the specified ValueError cases

acceptance_criteria.check: Does simple_moving_average return None for the first window-1 entries when window > 1?
Does simple_moving_average raise ValueError when prices is empty?
Does simple_moving_average raise ValueError when window < 1 (e.g. window=0)?
